tagline: Quality Residential Construction Across Essex and London
subtagline: Extensions • Renovations • New Builds • Loft Conversions

about.intro: RKay Construction are an Epping based, trusted  building and home improvement company, delivering quality craftsmanship across Essex and London. All of our professional and talented tradesmen have years of experience in extensions, loft conversions, renovations, and new builds, we take pride in transforming your dreams into reality.  Be it minor works, or major works, we will be with you from concept to completion, every step of the way.

values.title: Quality Craftsmanship
values.description: Every project is built to the highest standards with meticulous attention to detail.

values.title: Reliable Service
values.description: We deliver on our promises — on time, on budget, and with clear communication throughout.

values.title: Competitive Pricing
values.description: Premium quality construction at fair, transparent prices with no hidden costs.

services.title: Extensions
services.description: Expand your living space with a single or double-storey extension. Whether you require a rear, side or a wrap-around extension, we will work with you and your architect from concept stage through to finishing touches to deliver your dream home, on time and on budget.

services.title: Loft Conversions
services.description: Your loft space is so much more than just a storage area. Transform unused, empty loft space into stunning bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, or living areas.

services.title: New Builds
services.description: Complete new build construction, from design to concept, foundations to finishing touches,  We will guide you through every stage of the project to make your dream home a reality.

services.title: Kitchen & Bathroom Renovations
services.description: Beautiful, functional renovations that add value and style to two of the most important rooms in your home. The kitchen and bathroom should add the wow factor to your home, and we are here to deliver that for our clients.

services.title: Structural Alterations
services.description: Load-bearing wall removal, RSJ installation, and structural reconfigurations for minor or major changes to your home.

services.title: Full House Renovations
services.description: Full house renovations, from minor works and refreshes, to renovating your entire home, if you are looking for an alternative to an extension or other major structural work. We guarantee to bring your vision to life through consultation stage through to handing the keys back!

projects.title: Single-Storey Rear Extension — Chelmsford, Essex
projects.description: A spacious single-storey rear extension adding a timeless, stylish kitchen and family living area. This project was concept, to completion.

projects.title: Double-Storey Side And Rear Extension — Buckhurst Hill, Essex
projects.description: Double storey side and rear extension, with a full house renovation including a traditional kitchen and two high spec bathrooms.

projects.title: Single Storey Extension — Epping, Essex
projects.description: Single storey extension, creating an open plan kitchen-dining-living space, complete with premium finishes

projects.title: New Build — Great Dunmow, Essex
projects.description: Four-bedroom detached new build with part brick and part timber cladded facade. Full interior install, with bespoke finishes throughout.

projects.title: Extension And Kitchen Remodel — Woodford Green, Essex
projects.description: A single storey extension with a full house renovation consisting of this brand new kitchen finished with beautiful quartz worktops and top spec appliances.

projects.title: Single Storey Rear Extension — Galleywood, Essex
projects.description: Single storey rear extension, and partial garage conversion. This house was given a new lease of life with a 45sqm rear extension, and a stunning new, top range kitchen.

projects.title: Single Storey Rear Extension — Chelmsford
projects.description: Single storey rear extension with a full width, modern composite decking area. Full ground floor refurb with a high end kitchen and utility room.

projects.title: Single Storey Rear Extension — Wanstead
projects.description: A Stunning yellow stock brick extension with floor-to-ceiling glazed corner windows, seamlessly connecting indoor living with the garden. A new contemporary kitchen to add to the beauty of this build.

projects.title: Full House Re-Build — Epping, Essex
projects.description: A full house re-build, double storey side extension, single storey rear extension, a complete house refurb finished to an extremely high standard.

projects.title: Garden Room — Buckhurst Hill, Essex
projects.description: A 25sqm garden room, finished to a standard fit for the whole family to enjoy. Black aluminium bifolds and window to bring the outside in, and a fresh coat of pebble dash to match the existing house.

testimonials.name: Sarah & James Thomas
testimonials.quote: Ryan and his team at RKay Construction transformed our home with a stunning two-storey extension. Professional from start to finish. They worked with us from concept to completion. We really couldn't be happier with the result.

testimonials.name: David Morgan
testimonials.quote: Brilliant work on our loft conversion by RKay Construction. The team were reliable, tidy, and delivered exactly what was promised from day one. Turned our unused loft into a luxury master bedroom suite! Highly recommended.

testimonials.name: Emma & Chris Potter
testimonials.quote: Ryan and his team were recommended to us through our architect. From the initial site visit to the final walkthrough, everything was handled with care and consideration. A lot of builders can build you an extension, but there aren't many that go above and beyond to make sure it isn't just an extension, but your dream home.

quoteForm.title: Request a Free Quote

quoteForm.successMessage: Thanks! We'll review your project details and get back to you ASAP to arrange a free home visit!

sectionSubtitles.ourWork: Take a look at some of our recently completed projects across Essex and London.
sectionSubtitles.services: From foundations to finishing touches, we deliver comprehensive residential construction services to our clients across Essex and London.
